name: VTIL_GetActiveMask
title: VTIL_GetActiveMask
syntax: long VTIL_GetActiveMask(dbNode vt, dword & maskId); // form 2
description: Returns object ID of the active Data or Alarm Mask.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function

parameters.name: maskId
parameters.description: Returns object ID of the active data- or alarm mask

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
